parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  case_number:   $json.case_number,
  title:         $json.title,
  status:        'active',
  risk_score:    $json.risk_index,
  total_records: $json.total_records,
  ai_context:    $json.ai_context,
  analysis_json: $json.storage_payload,
  metadata:      JSON.stringify({ investigation_id: $json.investigation_id, anomaly_count: $json.anomaly_count }),
  records_json:  '[]',
  geo_json:      '[]',
  timeline_json: '[]'
}) }}

parameters.responseBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({
  success:          $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.success,
  investigation_id: $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.investigation_id,
  total_records:    $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.total_records,
  risk_index:       $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.risk_index,
  anomaly_count:    $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.anomaly_count,
  records_json:     $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.records_json,
  geo_json:         $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.geo_json,
  timeline_json:    $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.timeline_json,
  comm_links:       $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.comm_links,
  tower_analysis:   $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.tower_analysis,
  common_numbers:   $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.common_numbers,
  imei_mapping:     $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.imei_mapping,
  anomalies:        $('Parse & Score CDR Records').first().json.anomalies
}) }}

parameters.content: ROUTE 1 — INGEST: stores ONLY summary stats + hashed phone numbers. Raw records returned to frontend (memory only) but NEVER saved to DB.
ROUTE 2 — AI QUERY: POST { action:'ai-query', investigation_id, message }  →  reads minimal summary from DB  →  Gemini answers
ROUTE 3 — DESTROY: POST { action:'destroy', investigation_id }  →  DELETE row from Supabase permanently. Call this on session end / tab close.

WHAT IS STORED IN SUPABASE:
✅ Tower IDs + hit counts + city names
✅ Contact frequency counts
✅ HASHED phone numbers (one-way)
✅ IMEI counts
✅ Geo coordinates (lat/lng only)
✅ Date range + risk index

WHAT IS NEVER STORED:
❌ Raw CDR rows
❌ Plain-text phone numbers
❌ Full tower addresses
❌ IMSI numbers
❌ Location URLs
❌ The xlsx file itself

Session end → call destroy → DB row gone
